message:
fix(cli): update migrate test for FTS5 decommission

The migrate_creates_fts_table test was broken by 8100193e (FTS5
decommission). After Search V3 cutover, enforce_runtime_fts_cleanup
drops all FTS tables and triggers. Rename to migrate_cleans_fts_tables
and assert FTS tables are absent post-migration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
